title: Manager Gift Card Request
scenario: A message appears to come from your manager. It says they are in a meeting and need you to buy gift cards urgently, then send photos of the codes.

answers.A: Buy the cards because the manager sounds urgent.
answers.B: Reply asking which gift card amount they need.
answers.C: Verify the request through a known company channel before acting.
answers.D: Report the message as suspected impersonation.

explanation: Impersonation scams often use urgency, secrecy, and unusual payment methods. Gift card code requests are a major red flag.
proTip: Urgent money or gift card requests should always be verified out-of-band.
